condition.description: Defines an optional IAM condition to apply, specifying when the IAM policy binding takes effect, using attributes like title, description, and expression.

location.description: Specifies the GCP region where the Artifact Registry repository is located.

member.description: Specifies the identity to which the IAM role will be applied; must be in the format of an email address or predefined identity.

repository.description: Specifies the Artifact Registry repository to apply IAM bindings, must be a fully qualified repository name.

role.description: Specifies the IAM role to be assigned to the member for the Artifact Registry repository.
